calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Mandate Or Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Aug-16-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. TIMOTHY W. O'HARA, Esq. of Marvin Firestone, MD-JD & Associates, LLP (Tel: 650-212-4900) for petitioner Dr. Anuj Vaid;
Atty. STEFANO ABBASCIANO, Esq. of California Attorney General's Office (Tel: 510-879-0820) for respondents California Department of Corrections and Rehabilitation and California Correctional Health Care Services;
Atty. ALVIN GITTISRIBOONGUL, Esq. (Tel: 916-653-1403) of/for respondent California State Personnel Board.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER ANUJ VAID's Motion For Writ Of Mandate Or Administrative Mandate.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner Vaid's petition for writ of mandate under Code of Civil Procedure sections 1085 and 1094.5 is denied. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Mandate Or Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Jul-30-2021 Continued To Aug-16-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
